# VectorFFT hardware calibration
# L1d: 49152 bytes (48 KB)
# ISA: AVX2
# Format: type radix threshold_K
#   walk R K  — use block-walk for radix R when K >= threshold
#   il   R K  — use interleaved codelet for radix R when K >= threshold
#   0 = feature disabled for this radix

# Walk thresholds (generated by bench_walk)

# IL crossovers (generated by bench_il)
il     7   512
il     8   512
il    10   256
il    25    64
il    32    32
il    64   128
